title: Sentinel Shield operation lock
description: Transaction marker written to <target>/.sentinel-shield/operation-lock.json while a mutating operation (install/sync/migration/bootstrap) is in flight. Removed on successful commit; a lock left behind by an ungraceful kill is DETECTED on the next mutating run and recovered with --recover. Path values (target, snapshot_dir) are UNTRUSTED on read and MUST be re-validated for canonical containment before any use.

schema_version.description: Operation-lock schema version. Fixed at '1' for this contract.

operation.description: Mutating operation that owns the lock.

target.description: Canonical absolute path of the consuming project the operation is mutating. Re-validated against the current canonical target before any recovery.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the operation acquired the lock.

pid.description: PID of the process that acquired the lock.

snapshot_dir.description: Canonical path to the per-operation snapshot directory, which MUST live under <target>/.sentinel-shield/.txn-*. Re-validated for containment (no '..') before any restore.

state.description: Lifecycle state: 'active' while the operation runs; 'rollback-incomplete' when a recovery attempt could not fully roll back and retained the lock for manual recovery.
